name: Mystery Digger
author: Poki
description: Mystery Digger is a digging simulation game where every descent uncovers secrets beneath the surface. Explore the depths, collect mysterious items and notes, and slowly piece together a hidden story. Upgrade your drilling machine, boost your power, and take on quests to earn more cash. With simple controls and relaxing gameplay, every dig is a soothing adventure waiting to unfold! How to play Mystery Digger? Click or tap to shoot rockets and select items. Who created Mystery Digger? Mystery Digger is created by Gepnito Games. Play their other games on Poki: Puppetman: Ragdoll Puzzle ! How can I play Mystery Digger for free? You can play Mystery Digger for free on Poki. Can I play Mystery Digger on mobile devices and desktop? Mystery Digger can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
